name: GeographyPoint.From
signature: GeographyPoint.From( longitude as number, latitude as number, optional z as nullable number, optional m as nullable number, optional srid as nullable number ) as record
description: Creates a record representing a geographic point from its constituent parts, such as longitude, latitude, and if present, elevation (Z) and measure (M). An optional spatial reference identifier (SRID) can be given if different from the default value (4326).
